nasb.text: Now then, come and let us kill him and throw him into one of the pits; and we will say, ‘A wild beast devoured him.’ Then let us see what will become of his dreams!”

esv.text: Come now, let us kill him and throw him into one of the pits. Then we will say that a fierce animal has devoured him, and we will see what will become of his dreams.”

cnv.text: 來吧，我們把他殺了，丟在一個枯井裡，就說有猛獸把他吃了。我們要看看他的夢將來要怎麼樣。”

ccb.text: 来吧！我们杀了他，把他扔在井里，就说有野兽把他吃掉了，看他的梦怎么实现。”

csbs.text: 来吧！我们现在就把他杀了，丢在一个坑里，然后说有恶兽把他吃掉了；我们倒要看看他的梦将来会怎样！”
